message:
test(unit): expand pool (18→44), chaos (20→55), orphan_reaper (19→45) inline tests + fix error_clustering bounds check (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Expand test coverage for 3 modules with 105 new tests covering edge cases,
error paths, trait impls, serde roundtrips, concurrent behavior, and timing.
Fix cluster_info() to return None on out-of-bounds error_id instead of panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
